words.def: mildly acid red or yellow pulpy fruit eaten as a vegetable
the property of having little or no contrast; lacking highlights or gloss
words.zh: a. 表面暗淡的, 無光澤的, 表面粗糙的, 不光滑的

words.def: (ethnic slur) offensive and derogatory name for a Black man who is abjectly servile and deferential to Whites
